metadata.description: Control Apple Music from Claude Code. Natural-language control, a CLI, and an interactive TUI for playback, verified multi-room AirPlay, library browsing, catalog + library search, playlists, radio stations, discovery, a real equalizer with venue presets, the visualizer, and shuffle/repeat/Genius controls.

plugins.name: music
plugins.description: Control Apple Music from Claude Code. Natural-language control (the /music skill), a CLI, and an interactive TUI for playback, verified multi-room AirPlay, library browsing (artists, albums, songs), catalog + library search, playlists, radio stations, discovery, a real equalizer with venue presets, the on-screen visualizer, and shuffle/repeat/Genius controls; transport stays on your media keys. One-command CLI build; Apple Developer auth is only needed for search, library, and discovery features.
